# mailgun_mailing_list_members (Data Source)

Retrieves a list of all members in a Mailgun mailing list.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `list_address` (String) The email address of the mailing list.

### Read-Only

- `members` (Attributes List) List of members. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--members))
- `total_count` (Number) The total number of members found.

<a id="nestedatt--members"></a>
### Nested Schema for `members`

Read-Only:

- `address` (String) The email address of the member.
- `name` (String) The name of the member.
- `subscribed` (Boolean) Whether the member is subscribed.
